description_long: This object is a filled pastry resembling a Sicilian cannoli, featuring a golden-brown, tubular shell with a crisp, bubbled texture. The ends are generously stuffed with a creamy filling, which is coated in finely chopped pistachios and dusted with powdered sugar. The shell is partially dipped in dark chocolate, creating a glossy contrast against the matte pastry. The filling appears rich and slightly yellowish, likely ricotta-based, and is visible at both ends. The pastry rests on a textured white napkin, suggesting it is ready for serving. The overall appearance is appetizing, with a mix of crunchy, creamy, and sweet elements.
description: A golden-brown, chocolate-dipped pastry shell filled with creamy ricotta and topped with pistachios and powdered sugar, resembling a Sicilian cannoli. The ends are generously stuffed and the shell is crisp and bubbled.
description_view_0: Front view shows the filled end of the pastry, with pistachio topping and powdered sugar most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the tubular, bubbled shell, chocolate-dipped ends, and the filling peeking out from both sides.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the opposite filled end, with a dense layer of pistachios and powdered sugar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the shell's texture, chocolate coating, and a glimpse of the creamy filling.
